birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-shouldered fire-eye is found in eastern Brazil from eastern Bahia and southwestern Minas Gerais south to Mato Grosso do Sul and extreme northern Rio Grande do Sul, in eastern Paraguay from Canindeyú to Itapúa, and in extreme northeastern Argentina's Misiones Province
